title: NIMBLE — Node-Interconnect Multi-Path Balancing
summary_zh: 執行期編排多路徑 all-to-all 通訊以治理 skew：將 link 平衡建模為 multi-commodity flow，以 capacity-normalized MWU 在 <1 ms 內求解，並以 fused CUDA kernel 驅動 NVLink + RDMA 管線。H100-SXM4 + NDR400 上對 skewed all-to-allv 較 NCCL 最高 5.2×，MoE 端到端 1.35×，與 vanilla NCCL 位元一致。
summary_en: Runtime orchestration of multi-path all-to-all to defeat traffic skew: formulates link balancing as a multi-commodity flow solved with a capacity-normalized Multiplicative Weights Update in <1 ms, and drives NVLink + RDMA transfers through a fused CUDA kernel pipeline. Up to 5.2× over NCCL on skewed all-to-allv and 1.35× on MoE end-to-end on H100-SXM4 + NDR400, bit-identical to vanilla NCCL.
